clips.descriptionEn: A person raises one arm high and waves broadly, as if greeting someone from a distance.
A person raises both arms high and opens them outward in a big welcoming gesture.
A person gently shakes the head from side to side while standing naturally.

A person stands in place and raises both arms diagonally upward and outward into a broad steady victory pose with elbows slightly bent, like celebrating success or showing strong approval, without delicate finger poses.
A person makes two small jumps in place with natural arm movements.
A person scratches the head with one hand and tilts the body slightly to one side.
A person stretches both arms upward, leans back slightly, then returns to a relaxed standing pose.
A person slowly looks left and right while standing in place.
A person spreads both hands outward with palms up, as if asking a question.
A person turns slightly left and points to the left side with one hand.
A person turns slightly right and points to the right side with one hand.
A person gently pushes both hands forward and steps back slightly, signaling someone to step back.
A person looks frightened and steps backward several times while extending both arms forward in front of the body.
A person marches in place with relaxed arm swings.
A person walks forward at a brisk pace with relaxed arm movements.
A person slowly lowers from a standing pose to sitting on the ground with stable, natural body movement.
A person lying flat on the ground slowly rises to a standing position, then stretches both arms upward and leans back slightly.
A person hugs an imaginary object close to the chest and sways gently.
A person lies down on the ground and sleeps peacefully with relaxed limbs and steady breathing.
A person slowly spins around once in a full circle while standing in place.
A person cups one hand behind the ear and leans slightly sideways, listening carefully.
A person strikes a confident pose with stylish arm and leg positioning while standing in place.

A person stands naturally in place and nods the head exactly twice: each nod is one clear downward dip of the chin toward the chest followed by lifting back to neutral, using a large pronounced vertical range so the motion is easy to read; only two complete up-down cycles, no side-to-side movement and no extra nods.
A person shakes the head firmly from side to side with both palms facing outward in front of the body, refusing politely.
A person pumps both fists downward in an energetic cheering motion with upbeat body language.
A person waves one hand side to side at shoulder height in a friendly goodbye gesture.
A person claps several times in front of the chest while standing in place.
A person covers the face with both hands and shrinks the shoulders slightly in a shy reaction.
A person wipes one eye with the back of the hand and lowers the head slightly as if crying softly.
A person places both hands on the hips, lifts the chin, and stands proudly in place.
A person stamps one foot on the ground once with an annoyed upper-body gesture while standing.
A person takes a small step backward and raises both hands near the cheeks in surprise.
A person bows deeply from the waist with both hands held naturally in front of the body as a polite gesture.
A person touches one palm to the lips and flicks the hand outward to blow a kiss.
A person crosses both forearms in front of the chest forming an X shape to signal refusal.
A person rests one hand on the chin, gazes slightly downward, and holds still as if thinking deeply while standing in place.
A person bends the knees slightly, then jumps high into the air with both feet leaving the ground together, and lands with knees bent and arms swinging naturally for balance.
A person lifts one hand to the forehead and wipes across it once with the palm or back of the hand, then lowers the arm while standing in place as if wiping away sweat.
